title: Comfortable Family Home
label: Hot Offer
description: A beautiful comfortable family home located in a quiet neighborhood with excellent schools and amenities nearby. Recently renovated kitchen and bathrooms, hardwood floors throughout, and a spacious backyard perfect for entertaining.

title: Historic Villa
description: A stunning historic villa with classic architecture and modern amenities. Perfect for luxury living, featuring ornate ceilings, a private garden, and breathtaking views of the surrounding hills.

title: Villa for Sale
description: Spacious villa with modern design, large backyard, and premium finishes throughout. Open-concept living, chef's kitchen, and a resort-style pool make this a true entertainer's dream.

title: Villa with Pool
description: Luxurious villa with a stunning pool, landscaped garden, and breathtaking views. Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the home with natural light and frame the ocean horizon.

title: Villa Relaxing Green View
description: Elegant villa surrounded by lush greenery offering peace and tranquility. A sanctuary for those who value privacy, nature, and refined architecture in equal measure.

title: Modern Apartment
description: Sleek modern apartment with bay views, open floor plan, and top-of-the-line finishes. building amenities include a gym, rooftop lounge, and 24/7 concierge.

title: Comfortable Family Home Test
description: Charming family home with modern amenities and a spacious backyard. Move-in ready with a freshly painted interior and a new roof installed in 2025.

title: Luxury Apartment Bay View
label: Hot Offer
description: Luxury apartment with panoramic bay views, modern kitchen, and premium amenities. Wake up to the water every morning from your wraparound balcony.

title: Modern Studio Apartment
description: Cozy studio apartment in the heart of the city, perfect for young professionals. Steps from transit, cafes, and nightlife with all utilities included.

title: Commercial Office Space
description: Prime office space in downtown business district with modern facilities. Open floor plan, meeting rooms, and high-speed fiber internet ready to go.

title: Skyline Penthouse
label: Hot Offer
description: Breathtaking penthouse crowning a landmark tower with 360-degree city views, private elevator access, and a wraparound terrace built for entertaining.

title: Cozy Suburban Townhouse
description: Charming townhouse in a friendly community with a private garage, rooftop deck, and shared green space. Ideal for growing families seeking comfort and convenience.

title: Beachfront Condo
description: Wake up to the sound of waves in this beachfront condo with direct sand access, floor-to-ceiling glass, and a building rooftop infinity pool.

title: Modern Loft Downtown
description: Industrial-chic loft with exposed brick, 14-foot ceilings, and skyline views. A rare rental in the arts district with in-unit laundry and parking.

title: Prime Retail Space
description: High-visibility retail space on a busy boulevard with massive storefront windows, built-out fitting rooms, and heavy foot traffic daily.

title: Lakeside Land Plot
description: Build your dream home on this level lakeside parcel with approved permits, utilities at the street, and unobstructed water views from every angle.
